title: pilea lucens subsp. lucens
intro: Pilea lucens subsp. lucens is a type of flowering plant in the Urticaceae family, commonly known as the Pilea or Aluminum Plant due to its metallic-sheened leaves. The medicinal properties of Pilea lucens subsp. lucens have been studied for their potential in treating various ailments, including inflammation, fever, and skin conditions. The health benefits associated with this plant include its antioxidant, antimicrobial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to soothe and calm the skin. Herbal preparations of Pilea lucens subsp. lucens are often made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or by extracting the plant's oil to use topically.
